readings.summary: Peter calls the people to reform.

readings.citation:
Ps 4:2, 4, 7-8, 9, R. v.7a
Lord, let your face shine upon us.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 4:2, 4, 7-8, 9, R. v.7a
Lord, let your face shine upon us.

readings.summary: To know Jesus, keep his commandments.

Lord Jesus, open the Scriptures to us;
make our hearts burn while you speak to us.
Jesus appears to the disciples and says, “Peace be with you.”

antiphons.text:
The disciples recognized the Lord Jesus
in the breaking of the bread, alleluia.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Optional for Year B | Lk 24:46–47
antiphons.text:
The Christ had to suffer
and on the third day rise from the dead;
in his name repentance and remission of sins
must be preached to all the nations, alleluia.
